source_pr.title: *: the result of `admin show ddl ...` shows a job‘s start time
source_pr.body:
Remove the useless field of `LastUpdateTS` in Job.
Add the field of `StartTS` and support showing the start time in the result of `admin show ddl ...`.

symptoms: // SetRowCount sets the number of rows. Make sure it can pass `make race`.
failure_signature: // SetRowCount sets the number of rows. Make sure it can pass `make race`.
fix_pattern: *: the result of `admin show ddl ...` shows a job‘s start time
